block_00: Affiliate World Asia 2023 is on its way! 🎇
block_01: The biggest affiliate conference in Asia
block_03: Affiliate World is the star of affiliate marketing events, and it’s back again this year!
block_05: will be held in Bangkok, Thailand on December 7-8th and promises to be bigger and better than ever.
block_10: Join the fun and party in Bangkok
block_11: Participating in Affiliate World Asia always gives you access to exclusive insights and connections that can propel your affiliate business to new heights. But this year will be even more special. We’ve prepared a truly unique surprise for you that you don’t want to miss! Make sure to contact your manager to book a meeting, have a chat and find out more. 🤫
block_12: Our managers Panisara and Alina will be there at Booth D30 at the conference to meet you in person. Let’s meet and party together! 🎉
block_15: It’s an affiliate event you just can’t miss and we really hope to see you there!
